index.pleaseAcceptPermissions: Please accept permissions to access your location

index.noLegsFound: No legs found in the route
index.failedToFetch: Failed to fetch route data: Route not found or invalid response
index.planRoutesHint: Search for a destination, then tap Get Directions to plan your route. You can add stops between start and end.
index.planRoutesPlanningHint: Set start, destination, and optional stops. Tap Add stop for waypoints, then Let's go.
index.searchAndSelect: Search and select a location to proceed
index.tip: To get directions from your current location to a destination Google address, enter your destination Google address in the box above and click on the blue button that says let's go
index.typeMoreCharacters: Type at least 3 characters to search
index.sorryWeDidNotFind: Sorry we did not find an address for your location
index.butNoWorries: But no worries!! we've got your back!!

index.theAddressOfYourCurrentLocation: The address of your current location is
index.unknownErrorWhileAddingUnit: An unknown error occured while adding unit
index.aLetterCanBe:
A letter can be attahced to the house numbers if you are creating an address for multiple buildings withing the same compound, so each has a distinc address
Example: 75A Borstal Street and 75B Borstal Street.
index.ifThisAddressIs: If this address is for your business or an organization like NGO, Bank, School, Hospital, Restuarant, etc, you can enter the name of that business or organization here.
index.useThisTo: Use this to specify the address of a Room, Apartment, Suite or Plot within a compound or large building.
index.yourAddressHasBeen: Your address has been added successfully
index.yourUnitAddressHasBeenAdded: Your unit address has been added successfully
index.addAlias: Add an alias name to this address
index.butWeFound: But we found some nearby addresses
index.selectOne: Select the one which matches your address or create a new address for your current location.
index.hmmWeDidntFind: Hmm... We didn't find an exact address for your location.
index.gpsCanBeOff: GPS can be a bit off - try picking the nearest address instead.

error.packMissing: No offline map data for this area. Download the region data pack to enable navigation.
error.packCorrupt: The map data pack is corrupted. Please re-download it.
error.packIncompatible: The map data pack is outdated. Please download a newer version.
error.routeNotFound: No route found between these locations. Try a different transport mode.
error.gpsUnavailable: GPS is unavailable. Please enable location services.
error.engineFailed: Navigation engine failed to initialize. Please try again.
error.engineUnavailableOnDevice: In-app turn-by-turn is not available on this device. Use "Open in another app" to navigate with Google Maps or another app.
error.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
error.qrInvalid: This QR code is not a valid navigation code.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
